name: Bestower Ω
ability: Each night, choose a player (not yourself) & give them a boon or curse. The selected player is asked to accept.
flavor: I bestow upon you this gift.
firstNightReminder: Wake the Bestower to select a player. Then the Bestower to select boon or curse. Wake the selected character and ask if they accept. Give them the boon/curse if they accept.
otherNightReminder: The Bestower chooses a player and chooses either boon or curse. Wake the chosen player and ask if they would like to accept. If they accept give them either a boon or curse based on the choice.

name: Cat Ω
ability: Each day, you publicly choose a player: swap seats with them. If you swap seats with a player of your alignment, you can't die until you swap again. One opposing player registers as your alignment to your ability.

name: Pilgrim Ω
ability: Each day, you may visit the Storyteller to make a decision or learn information relating to a Loric or Fabled. (+0 or +1 Loric or Fabled while you are alive)
flavor: Long roads make friends of strange fellows and faiths.

name: Skaldi Ω
ability: If at least one of your alive neighbors is a Minion, you can't die.
flavor: The harsh winds of the North gloss my lips. My skin bears no ill intent to the force of nature it's encompassed by every day. To be cold, is to be me.

name: Sympath
ability: Each night*, you become the alignment of the recently killed executee.
flavor: I feel your pain, let me join you.
otherNightReminder: They become the alignment of the most recently killed executee.

name: Watcher Ω
ability: Each night, choose a player (different from last night). You learn their information instead of them; the player is told they are being watched. If a player is mad about being watched today, they might die.
flavor: He was never meant to be there...He was only ever meant to watch
firstNightReminder: wake and choose a player, if the player learns information, inform the watcher of the info and inform the player they are watched
otherNightReminder: wake and choose a player, if the player learns information, inform the watcher of the info and inform the player they are watched
